concerns.text: FR-002 requires the classifier to infer states from 'dialogue history every few turns'. T019 generates training data using 'ONLY scenario metadata tags' (static attributes), and T020 trains the classifier on this static data. There is no task to generate or process turn-level dialogue text for the classifier's training set, making the FR-002 requirement impossible to satisfy.

FR-004 mandates execution in a CPU-only environment without CUDA or quantization libraries. While T027 mentions 'CPU-only inference loop', there is no explicit task to enforce the exclusion of GPU-accelerated libraries (e.g., bitsandbytes, flash-attn) in the dependency installation or runtime checks, risking violation of the constraint if the environment has CUDA drivers.

SC-005 requires measuring the 'variation in the number of injected directives' when sweeping confidence thresholds. T039 implements the sweep script but lacks a specific task to calculate and report this variation metric, leaving the success criterion unmeasurable.

The spec's assumptions state that models requiring >7GB RAM will be excluded. T002 installs dependencies but there is no task to implement the 'model exclusion logic' or memory-checking mechanism required to gracefully skip large models, leaving the implementation vulnerable to runtime crashes.

SC-003 requires verifying throughput (≥40/hr) and latency (≤45s). T042 ('Implement performance monitoring') is vague and does not include a task to explicitly calculate these metrics against the thresholds and fail the build if criteria are not met.
